paccheri-and-clams.name: Paccheri And Clams
instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add half the garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until pale golden, 1–2 minutes. Add pepper flakes and cook for 10 seconds. Add clams and white wine; cover and boil just until clams open, about 6 minutes. Drain, reserving clam broth; set broth and clams aside.
Meanwhile, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Add pasta and cook until almost al dente, about 8 minutes. Drain pasta, reserving 1/2 cup cooking liquid.

Heat remaining 4 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add remaining garlic; cook, stirring often, until pale golden, about 2 minutes. Add reserved clam broth and pasta liquid. Bring to a boil; boil until sauce is emulsified, about 1 minute. Add pasta and cook, stirring often, until sauce begins to cling to the pasta but is still loose, about 3 minutes. Stir in parsley, then gently stir in clams. Divide among bowls.

paleo-candied-hot-roasted-pecan-bits.name: Paleo Candied Hot Roasted Pecan Bits
instructions: Preheat oven to 107°C (110 degrees C).
Put pecans in a resealable bag and pound into small pieces.
Mix bacon drippings, palm sugar, sea salt, and cayenne pepper together in a bowl. Add pecans to the bowl and stir to coat using a spatula. Spread coated pecan pieces onto a rimmed baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven, stirring every 15 minutes, until pecans are toasted and fragrant, about 1 hour. Cool to room temperature and stir in an air-tight container.

panisses.name: Panisses
instructions: Lightly coat a 13x9" baking dish with nonstick spray. Whisk chickpea flour and 1 tsp. salt in a large bowl, breaking up any clumps in flour. Make a well in the center and gradually pour broth into well, whisking to incorporate dry ingredients; add garlic and Sriracha and whisk until batter is smooth.
Transfer mixture to a large heavy saucepan and cook over medium-high heat, whisking constantly, until bubbling and very thick (you will be able to see bottom of pan when whisking), 8–10 minutes.
Pour chickpea mixture into prepared baking dish and smooth top. Press plastic wrap directly onto surface and chill until firm, at least 3 hours.

Turn chickpea mixture out onto a cutting board and cut into 3x½” pieces. Pour oil into a large skillet, preferably cast iron, to a depth of ¼” and heat over medium-high heat until oil bubbles immediately when a small piece of chickpea mixture is added. Working in batches, fry until panisses are deep golden brown and crisp, about 2 minutes per side; transfer to a paper towel–lined plate and season with salt.
DO AHEAD: Chickpea mixture can be made and poured into baking dish 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

pappardelle.name: Pappardelle
instructions: Place 2 1/2 cups flour and 3/4 teaspoon salt in processor; blend 5 seconds. Whisk 3 eggs, 3 yolks, and 3 tablespoons water in bowl. With machine running, pour egg mixture through feed tube. Blend until sticky dough forms, adding water by teaspoonfuls if dry.

Scrape dough out onto floured work surface. Knead dough until smooth and no longer sticky, sprinkling lightly with flour as needed if sticky, about 8 minutes. Shape into ball. Cover with plastic wrap and let rest 45 minutes. Repeat with remaining flour, salt, eggs, yolks, and water.
Divide each dough ball into 4 pieces. Cover dough with plastic wrap.

Set pasta machine to widest setting. Flatten 1 dough piece into 3-inch-wide rectangle. Run through machine 5 times, dusting lightly with flour if sticking. Continue to run piece through machine, adjusting to next-narrower setting after every 5 passes, until dough is about 26 inches long. Cut crosswise into 3 equal pieces. Run each piece through machine, adjusting to next-narrower setting, until strip is scant 1/16 inch thick and 14 to 16 inches long. Return machine to original setting for each piece. Arrange strips in single layer on sheets of parchment.

Repeat with remaining dough. Let strips stand until slightly dry to touch, 20 to 30 minutes. Fold strips in half so short ends meet, then fold in half again. Cut strips into 2/3-inch-wide pappardelle. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Arrange pappardelle in single layer on sheets of parchment. Stack sheets in roasting pan. Cover; chill.

paprika-chicken-rice-bake.name: Paprika Chicken & Rice Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
In a large bowl, evenly season chicken thighs with salt, pepper, paprika, and parsley.
On high, heat olive oil in a oven-proof pot and place chicken thighs, skin-side down, in the hot oil. Cook 5-6 minutes or the thighs develop brown crispy skin and flip over.
Cook an additional 5-6 minutes to brown the other side and remove from the pot.
Add the garlic and onions to the pot, and cook until the onions are transparent.
Pour in the rice and chicken broth to the pot and season with salt and pepper. Stir well, bringing to a boil.
Add the chicken thighs back into the pot, skin-side up, on top of the rice, bring back to a boil and cover with a lid.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the rice is fully cooked.
NOTE: For a crispy skin, remove chicken thighs and broil.
Enjoy!

paradise-cake-conventual-recipe-teleculi.name: Paradise Cake - Conventual Recipe
instructions: Put the sugar and water in a pot, take the light and let it boil for 20 minutes. Remove from the fire, add the ground almond and stir.

Tap the eggs slightly with the yolks and add to the pot, in thread and stirring always. Take it back to the fire, stirring over and over, until you start seeing the bottom of the pot. Remove from the fire, add the grated bread and cinnamon and stir.

Bind a shape (20 cm in diameter) with butter and sprinkle it with flour. Release the previous mixture into the form, spread well and light in the oven, preheated at 180° C, for 40 minutes. Remove, peel, cool and serve cold sprinkled with powdered sugar.

pasta-salad-with-shrimps-argiro.name: Pasta Salad With Shrimps
instructions: Boil the pasta first in plenty of salted water and drain well.
Then put the pasta in a salad pot along with cucumber, pepper, dill, parsley, avocado, chopped onions and shrimp.
In a bowl, combine the ingredients of the sauce and mix well.
Pour the pasta salad with shrimp, mix well to go everywhere and serve.
If you want to take off this recipe, make your own homemade mayonnaise.
Alternatively, during the fasting season, enjoy your pasta salad with the fasting mayonnaise.
See all secrets to clean and maintain shrimp properly.

pasta-with-tomato-sauce-meatballs-lezzet.name: Pasta With Tomato Sauce & Meatballs
instructions: 1. Do you want to try the tomato sauce & pasta with meats in one way? Take a rough dough for dough.
2. When you drain the water, add the flour of the galeta, salt, spices and thin thin peanuts, and round the walnut size pieces from the carefully kneading mortar.
3. Stretch over and wait in the refrigerator.
4.  By the way, prepare the sauce.
5. For this, heat the liquid oil in a large pan, roam the chopped onion and garlic.
6. Add the sachet in the form of membranes.
7. A few minutes more roast.
8. Add the tomatoes that you eat in the form of tincture.
9. Cook in high fire, stirring for 5 minutes, together.
10. Meanwhile mix the sum with hot water.
11. 11. Add the filled water into the ceiling.
12. In medium fire, boil for 10 minutes.
12. August Add pasta into sauced water and sprinkle for 10 minutes.
14 July  In this way, fry meatballs in liquid oil.
15.  Take the cooked pasta into the serving plate, and put the meatballs you're angry with.
16. Then do fine chopped parsley and reindeed mozzarella serpip service.
17. September You can reach the recipe of pasta with meatballs that will bring color to your tables here.

peanut-butter-protein-cookies.name: Peanut Butter Protein Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Mash bananas in a bowl and add applesauce, peanut butter, and vanilla extract. Mash together until well mixed. Add oats, walnuts, and protein powder. Mix until cookie dough comes together. Let sit for 8 to 10 minutes.
Use a tablespoon to scoop dough into 15 medium balls and place 2 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are golden, 20 to 30 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before removing to a wire rack to cool completely.

pecan-cranberry-bites.name: Pecan Cranberry Bites
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine the cranberries, almond butter, maple syrup, and vanilla, and stir until smooth.
Add the oats, pecans, and salt, and mix until evenly distributed.
Chill in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
Use a tablespoon to scoop out the mixture, then roll into balls with your hands.
Store in the refrigerator in an airtight container for up to 1 week.
Enjoy!

peloponnese-yogurt-argiro.name: Peloponnese Yogurt

ingredients.item: 1/4 cup of ouzo (or extra orange juice)
1/4 cup of ouzo (or extra orange juice)

instructions: All materials must be at room temperature.
In a bowl, beat the whites with a pinch of salt in a meringue until it makes soft peaks.
In another bowl, add the yolks, vanillas and sugar and beat with a hand mixer until they fluffy well.
Add the yogurt, baking and semolina and continue the hit.
Dissolve our soda in orange juice and pour the ingredients.
Add the ouzo and continue the blow until homogenized.
Finally, add the meringue and gently fold with spatula to lose the meringue in the mixture.
Pour into a well buttered 30 cm baking pan.
Straighten the surface and baking in a well preheated oven at 170 °C, in the air, for about 40 seconds until the surface is inflamed and golden.
After it cools, cut it into pieces and pour slowly with the hot syrup.
Allow the sweet to cool completely and suck all the syrup.
You can rub the yogurt with a light lemon cream.
Freeze it in the refrigerator.

perfectly-creamy-potato-soup.name: Perfectly Creamy Potato Soup

ingredients.item: . russet or yukon gold potatoes (about 4 large)
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: chopped pickled jalapeños, and finely chopped dill (for serving)

instructions: Mix 2 lb. russet or Yukon Gold potatoes (about 4 large), scrubbed, thinly sliced, 1 lb. white onions (about 2 medium), thinly sliced, 6 garlic cloves, coarsely chopped, ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. dried thyme, and 1 cup water in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot to combine. Cover and cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally and adjusting heat as need to keep vegetables from browning, until onions are very tender and translucent, 12–18 minutes.
Add 4 cups low-sodium chicken broth to pot, re-cover, and cook until potatoes are tender and falling apart, 12–18 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in ½ cup sour cream.

Using an immersion blender, blend soup in pot until mostly smooth; you want some small lumps and pieces of skin. (Alternatively, you can purée soup, in batches in a food processor, transferring to a medium bowl as you go. Return soup to pot before proceeding.)

Stir 2 tsp. distilled white vinegar and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper into soup and reheat over medium, stirring often, until hot but not bubbling (boiling might curdle the soup). Taste and season with more salt and/or pepper if desired.

Ladle soup among bowls. Top each with a dollop of sour cream and scatter scallions, pickled jalapeños, and dill over. Drizzle with oil.
Do ahead: Soup (without toppings) can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat soup over medium-low, adding a splash or so of water to thin as needed. Season with more salt and pepper if desired.

pesto-turkey-meatballs.name: Pesto Turkey Meatballs
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Lightly grease a sheet pan.
Combine turkey, bread crumbs, pesto, Pecorino Romano cheese, egg, salt, and pepper in a mixing bowl and mix with your hands until well combined.
Roll mixture into small, walnut-sized meatballs. Place onto the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the centers, 20 to 25 minutes.

pickled-banana-peppers.name: Pickled Banana Peppers
instructions: Slice tops off all peppers, then slice peppers into thin discs. Put peppers into a 6-quart jar.
Mix canola oil, vinegar, water, salt, oregano, garlic, and sugar together in a large bowl until salt and sugar are dissolved. Pour over peppers in the jar; stir and refrigerator for 24 hours.
Stir peppers before serving; store remaining pickled peppers in the refrigerator.

pickled-crudites.name: Pickled Crudités

ingredients.item: Baby or small red-skinned sweet potatoes

ingredients.prep: peeled, trimmed with  0.5” green tops still attached
trimmed with  0.5” green tops still attached
trimmed, halved lengthwise, cut into  0.333” wedges with some core attached
cored, halved lengthwise, or assorted red, yellow, and orange bell peppers

instructions: Mix first 11 ingredients and 8 cups water in a large pot. Bring to a boil and stir until sugar and salt dissolve.

Add sweet potatoes, brussels sprouts, carrots, and turnips; cook until just barely crisp-tender, about 5 minutes. Add fennel; cook for 1 minute. Add peppers, pressing to submerge; remove pot from heat and let cool to room temperature. Cover and chill vegetables until cold.
Do ahead: Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled. Drain vegetables before serving.

pilaf-with-vermicelli.name: Pilaf With Vermicelli

ingredients.item: Basmati or other long-grain white rice

instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add pasta and cook, stirring often, until golden brown and very fragrant, about 4 minutes. Add rice and gently stir to coat in butter. Add broth and a big pinch of salt, increase heat to medium-high, and bring to a simmer. Stir once, then cover and reduce heat to low. Cook until broth is absorbed and rice is tender, 18–20 minutes. Remove from heat, uncover, and fluff rice gently with a fork. Cover and let sit 5–10 minutes before serving.

pineapple-meringue-pie.name: Pineapple Meringue Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine 1 cup sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a large saucepan; stir in pineapple and juice until blended. Bring to a boil; cook and stir until thickened, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat.

Place egg yolks in a bowl; gradually stir in 1 cup pineapple mixture. Stir yolk mixture into pineapple mixture in the saucepan, stirring constantly. Bring to a gentle boil; cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in lemon juice and keep warm.

Beat egg whites and cream of tartar in a glass, metal, or ceramic bowl with an electric mixer until soft peaks form; beat in 6 tablespoons sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, on high speed until meringue forms stiff peaks.
Pour hot filling into pastry shell; spread meringue over filling, sealing edges to crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until meringue is golden, about 15 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 1 hour, then refrigerate before cutting, at least 3 hours.

pineapple-upside-down-cobbler.name: Pineapple Upside-down Cobbler

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt
Drained sour black cherries in syrup (such as amarena; about 1 cup)

instructions: Place a rack in top third of oven; preheat to 375°. Pour ¾ cup (1½ sticks) unsalted butter, melted, into a 13x9" glass or ceramic baking dish and swirl to evenly coat bottom and sides. Whisk 3⅓ cups (417 g) self-rising flour, 2½ cups whole milk, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2½ cups (500 g) granulated sugar in a large bowl to combine. (Batter will be loose; some lumps are okay.)

Scatter 18 drained sour black cherries in syrup (about ½ cup) and 1½ cups drained crushed pineapple evenly across bottom of prepared baking dish. Gently pour batter over. Scatter remaining 18 drained sour black cherries in syrup (about ½ cup) and remaining 1½ cups drained crushed pineapple evenly over batter. Sprinkle ½ cup (100 g) raw sugar on top. Place baking dish on a rimmed baking sheet and bake, rotating halfway through, until top of cobbler is golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out with just a few moist crumbs attached, 65–70 minutes.

Beat 2 cups heavy cream, 2 tsp. vanilla extract, and remaining 2 Tbsp. (25 g) granulated sugar in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment on medium-high speed until soft peaks form, about 2 minutes. (Or, use a hand mixer and a large bowl.)
Divide warm cobbler among bowls or plates. Top each with a dollop of whipped cream and more cherries.

pink-brain-shooter.name: Pink Brain Shooter
instructions: Lightly grease a brain-shaped gelatin mold.

Stir peach gelatin mix with 3 cups boiling water in a bowl until gelatin is dissolved. Allow to cool to room temperature, about 20 minutes. Mix in evaporated milk and peach schnapps; pour into the prepared mold. Refrigerate until set, 4 to 6 hours.
Dip the mold in warm water to loosen; don't let water enter the top of the mold. Invert the mold onto a serving platter and lift to release the brain.

Mix blue and red food coloring in a small bowl with 2 teaspoons water. Use a small, clean paintbrush to paint coloring into the grooves of the brain. Place the brain into the refrigerator until color sets. Serve cold.

poblano-potato-and-corn-gratin.name: Poblano, Potato, And Corn Gratin

ingredients.item: Coarsely grated oaxaca cheese or whole-milk mozzarella cheese

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Rub 9 1/2-inch-diameter deep-dish glass pie dish or cast-iron skillet with 2 teaspoons oil. Heat remaining 1 teaspoon oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add poblano strips and sauté until tender, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat.

Arrange 1/3 of potato rounds, overlapping slightly, in prepared pie dish. Sprinkle 1/3 of poblano strips over, then 1/3 of corn and 1/3 of cheese. Repeat with 1/3 of potatoes, 1/3 of poblanos, 1/3 of corn, and 1/3 of cheese. Top with remaining potatoes, poblanos, and corn, reserving remaining 1/3 of cheese. Place pie dish on rimmed baking sheet.

Whisk half and half, flour, 3/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper in small bowl. Pour over potato mixture in pie dish; press potatoes to submerge. Cover dish tightly with foil. Bake 30 minutes. Remove foil; sprinkle remaining cheese over gratin. Continue to bake gratin until potatoes are tender and cheese is golden brown, about 25 minutes longer. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.

pomegranate-molasses-chicken-with-bulgur.name: Pomegranate Molasses Chicken With Bulgur Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Pomegranate molasses is available at middle eastern markets and some supermarkets or online.

instructions: Toss chicken, garlic, chile, and 3 Tbsp. pomegranate molasses in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Cover and let chill at least 2 hours.
Meanwhile, cook bulgur according to package directions. Drain and spread out on a baking sheet; let cool.
Toss bulgur, currants, pistachios, olive oil, ¾ cup parsley, ½ cup mint, and remaining 1 Tbsp. pomegranate molasses in a large bowl to combine; season with salt and pepper.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium. Remove chicken from marinade and, working in 2 batches, cook until golden brown, about 4 minutes per side (reduce heat if needed).
Serve chicken over bulgur salad topped with pomegranate seeds and more parsley and mint.
Do Ahead: Chicken can be marinated 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

poppy-seed-bread-with-glaze.name: Poppy Seed Bread With Glaze
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease bottoms of two 9-inch loaf pans.
Mix flour, salt, baking powder, poppy seeds, 1 ½ teaspoons butter flavoring, oil, eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla, and almond flavoring together in a large bowl. Pour into prepared pans.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaves comes out clean, about 1 hour. Cool loaves for 5 minutes, then poke holes in top of loaves; pour glaze over top of bread.

To make the glaze: Mix orange juice, 1/2 teaspoon butter flavoring, 1/2 teaspoon almond flavoring, and 1 teaspoon vanilla together in a bowl; stir in enough confectioners' sugar to make a smooth glaze.

pork-adobo-pull-apart-sliders.name: Pork Adobo Pull-apart Sliders

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep:
peeled, halved or quartered lengthwise if large,
thinly sliced

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Pat 3 lb. boneless pork shoulder (Boston butt), cut into 4 equal pieces, dry and sprinkle all over with 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and 1 tsp. freshly ground black pepper. Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Cook pork, turning occasionally, until deep golden brown, 12–14 minutes.

Add 1 medium onion, quartered, 1 head of garlic, cloves finely chopped, 4 dried bay leaves, 1¼ cups unseasoned rice vinegar, 1 cup soy sauce, and 1 cup water to pot. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer, turning pork occasionally, until meat shreds easily, 1½–2 hours. Remove from heat.

Transfer pork to a plate. Strain braising liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl; discard solids. Return liquid to pot. Using 2 forks, shred meat into bite-size pieces; return to pot. Cover and keep warm.
Do ahead: Pork can be made 2 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat over medium-low until warm.

While the pork is braising, place 6 oz. daikon, peeled, halved or quartered lengthwise if large, thinly sliced, 3 Persian cucumbers, thinly sliced, and one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, in a small heatproof bowl or 1-pint jar. Bring 1 cup unseasoned rice vinegar, ¼ cup sugar, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes, and ½ cup water to a bare simmer in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Pour brine over vegetables and let cool.

Heat broiler. Using a long serrated knife and leaving rolls attached on the sides, slice entire slab of one 12-oz. package King’s Hawaiian Sweet Rolls horizontally through the equator. Place top and bottom halves, cut side up, on a large rimmed baking sheet and broil until golden brown, 1–2 minutes. Spread cut sides with ½ cup mayonnaise and transfer bottom half to a platter.

Using tongs, remove pork from braising liquid, letting
excess drip back into pot, and heap on bottom half of rolls; pour liquid into a small
bowl. Top pork with drained pickles; close up with top half of rolls.

Serve with braising liquid alongside for dipping or drizzling. (Made for letting guests pull apart as desired, but you can cut into individual sliders if preferred.)
Do ahead: Pickles can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

pork-chops-in-garlic-mushroom-sauce.name: Pork Chops In Garlic Mushroom Sauce

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Season both sides of pork chops with paprika, salt, and pepper.

Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat; add 2 tablespoons butter. Sear pork chops until golden brown and no longer pink in the center, 2 to 4 minutes per side. Remove pork chops from the skillet and set aside.

Melt remaining butter in the same skillet over medium-high heat. Add mushrooms and cook until golden and excess moisture evaporates, about 5 minutes. Add garlic and mustard; cook until garlic is fragrant, about 1 minute.

Add flour to the skillet, stirring to remove any lumps. Slowly add beef broth, whisking until incorporated. Season with salt and pepper. Reduce heat to medium and simmer, stirring often, until sauce thickens, about 5 minutes. Check for seasoning again.
Return pork chops to the skillet and cook until heated through, about 1 minute. Serve hot.
Enjoy!

pork-steaks-with-mushrooms-teleculinaria.name: Pork Steaks With Mushrooms
instructions: Start the oven at 190oC in ventilated function. Season the steaks with salt and pepper and reserve.
Coloque os cogumelos numa tigela grande e tempere-os com sal e pimenta. Adicione as natas, a manteiga derretida, os dentes de alhos picados e metade do queijo ralado. Misture bem e reserve.

Deite metade do preparado de cogumelos num tabuleiro de forno. Disponha os bifes por cima (podem ficar sobrepostos) e cubra com o restante preparado de cogumelos. Polvilhe com o queijo que sobrou e leve ao forno.
However, prepare the accompaniment: peel, clean and cut the pumpkin into pieces. Season them with salt, pepper, olive oil, lemon juice and cardamom and wrap.

Place it on a tray, lined with vegetable paper, and also put it in the oven. Let the meat and pumpkin roast together for about 30 to 35 minutes. Remove everything from the oven, sprinkle the pumpkin with chopped parsley and serve as a side of the mushroom steaks.

pork-tenderloin-with-date-and-cilantro-r.name: Pork Tenderloin With Date And Cilantro Relish

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Chopped fresh cilantro plus leaves for serving

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Season pork with salt and pepper and cook, turning, until browned on all sides, 6–8 minutes. Transfer skillet to oven and cook pork until an instant-read thermometer inserted in thickest part registers 140°, 10–15 minutes. Transfer pork to a cutting board and let rest at least 5 minutes before slicing; set aside pan drippings.

Toss dates, orange juice, reserved pan drippings, 3 Tbsp. chopped cilantro, and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper. Spoon relish over pork and top with cilantro leaves.
DO AHEAD: Relish (without pan drippings) can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill. Add pan drippings just before serving.

porto-style-francesinha-teleculinaria.name: Porto-style Francesinha
instructions: To begin this recipe, prepare the sauce: peel the onion, pinch it roughly, lay it down for a pot, add the margarine and the blonde, take it to the fire and let it cook until it gets golden. Add tomato pulp, meat broth and beer and let it boil. Dissolve the moreena flour in a little milk and add to the pot, in yarn and stirring always. Rectify the salt, season with spicy, stir, add the brandy and Port and let it boil. Go through the hammock and take it back to the light to warm up.

Cut the sausages in half, then again in half in the direction of length and season them with salt and pepper. Cut the sausages the same way. Also season the steaks with salt and pepper. Grate the steaks, sausages and sausage to taste.

Slightly tower the slices of bread and distribute two slices for two dishes. Cover with a slice of ham, then add the steak and add another slice of bread. Then add the sausage and sausage, cover with a slice of cheese and the rest of bread. Then add three slices of cheese on top of each set, bring to the oven at 200

potato-salad-with-yogurt-argiro.name: Potato Salad With Yogurt
instructions: Clean and cut the potatoes into thick pieces.
Place them in a pot with water (cover them), add salt and place them on fire for about 20 minutes after they are boiled. We want them to soften up, but not melt.
Drain them well and add them to a bowl.
With a hot fork, break them into bites and pour with oil, vinegar, lemon. Mix well.
Allow them to cool a little longer and add the yogurt and all the other ingredients.
Mix with salt and pepper.
Freeze the potato salad with yoghurt in the refrigerator and serve it cool as an accompaniment.

potato-skins.name: Potato Skins
instructions: Rub potatoes with olive oil and place on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until tender, about 1 hour. Remove from the oven and let sit until cool enough to handle, about 10 minutes. Increase the oven temperature to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Cut potatoes in half lengthwise. Scoop out flesh, leaving 1/4 inch on the skin. Brush canola oil all over potato skins, outside and inside, then sprinkle with salt. Reserve flesh for another use.
Bake skins in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Flip and continue baking for 10 minutes more. Remove from the oven and turn on the oven's broiler.
Meanwhile, cook bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon on a paper towel-lined plate; crumble.

Arrange potato skins flesh-side up on a roasting pan or rack; season flesh with black pepper. Sprinkle with Cheddar cheese and crumbled bacon. Cook under the preheated broiler until cheese is bubbly, about 2 minutes. Remove from the oven.
Add a dollop of sour cream to each skin and sprinkle with green onions to serve.

potato-soup-with-gravlax-rosettes.name: Potato Soup With Gravlax Rosettes

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat, and cook and stir the potatoes and onion until the onion starts to become translucent, about 3 minutes. Raise heat to medium, pour in the vegetable broth, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer, cover, and cook until the potatoes are tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Pour the mixture into a large bowl, and puree through a food mill back into the saucepan. (Discard any fibrous vegetables left in the food mill.)
Bring the pureed soup back to a simmer over medium-low heat, and whisk in 6 tablespoons of mascarpone. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice to taste.
Preheat oven to 93°C (95 degrees C), and warm 4 oven-safe soup plates for about 5 minutes.

Roll a slice of smoked salmon loosely into a rose shape, pinching the roll at the bottom and fanning the roll out at the top. Place a rosette of salmon into the bottom of each warmed soup plate, gently pour the soup over the rosette, and drizzle each bowl with about 1/2 tablespoon of mascarpone cheese. Sprinkle with chives, and serve.

potatoes-with-rosemary-in-the-oven-or-in.name: Potatoes With Rosemary In The Oven Or In The Air Fryer
potatoes-with-rosemary-in-the-oven-or-in.original_name: Patatas con romero al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 800 g de patatas nuevas (variedades kennebec o spunta)
3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
1 cucharadita de sal gruesa o en escamas
1 ramita de romero fresco (o 1 cucharadita seco)

instructions: Primero lavamos bien las patatas con su piel, sin pelarlas, frotando con un cepillo si es necesario.
We dry and cut into thick shackles and leave the skin. Don't worry about how big these cuts are because they will reduce their size slightly in the oven.

We put them on the oven plate and water them with extra virgin olive oil with thick salt, powder garlic (this is optional) and rosemary. We mix well so that the potatoes are impregnated throughout, and then we place them onto the plate and divide them with each other so that they are good throughout. If you prefer you can have the salt once you have roasted (the salt on scales is sublime).
The potatoes have been roasted in the pressurized oven at 180 ° C for about 30 minutes, or until they are put out inside (depending on the size of the glove). Mid-time we turned our potatoes.
Pasado el tiempo sacamos y servimos inmediatamente.

prasopita-without-foil-argiro.name: Prasopita Without Foil

ingredients.item: A little cornmeal for the baking pan
A little cornmeal for the baking pan

instructions: Clean and wash the leeks and fresh onions. Cut them into thin slices.
In a pan, add the leads with 1⁄4 cup of water. Drain for a few minutes until the liquids soften and Evaporate.
When dried, add some of the total olive oil and a small piece of butter. Sauté for 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In a bowl, beat the eggs, yogurt and the remaining olive oil with wire until homogenized.
Add the fresh onions, dill, nutmeg and lots of freshly ground pepper. Mix the ingredients well.
Add the feta cheese, leeks, and finally the flour and corn. Gently mix until all the ingredients are combined.
Brush with some olive oil the base and the walls of a shadow baking pan (about 22×30 cm) and sprinkle with some cornice.
Pour the mixture into the baking pan, straighten the surface with a spoon and pour with the remaining olive oil.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 170°C in the air, in the medium rack, for about 35 minutes, until the base is browned around and cooked well.
Allow the pie to stand for 10 minutes to stabilize, and then cut into pieces.

prepare-a-delicious-falafel-and-yogurt-w.name: Prepare A Delicious Falafel And Yogurt Wrap Step By Step
prepare-a-delicious-falafel-and-yogurt-w.original_name: Prepara paso a paso un rico wrap de falafel y yogur

ingredients.item: 1 taza de garbanzos secos  (remojados durante la noche)

instructions: We started by preparing the falafel. In a food processing or liquefier, mix the ingredients of the falafel up to a homogenous paste.
It forms small balls and clamps them slightly up to a kind of topus. Fry in hot oil till they're golden.
To prepare the yogurt, you have to mix all the above mentioned ingredients into a bowl and get a smooth and homogenous sauce.

To a hot omelette, add a portion of falafel at the centre, some cuts of tomato, cucumber and lettuce leaves. Before closing, add your desired amount of yogurt sauce and then double very well. Cut in half, if you wish.

prepare-avocado-hummus-with-only-five-in.name: Prepare Avocado Hummus With Only Five Ingredients
prepare-avocado-hummus-with-only-five-in.original_name: Prepara hummus de aguacate con solo cinco ingredientes
instructions: Partimos los aguacates por la mitad, quitamos el hueso y sacamos toda la pulpa.
In the processor add hummus, avocado cut into cubes, cilantro, lemon juice, salt and pepper.
Mix till the ingredients are well incorporated.
Serves and decorates with cilantro. Enjoy his full taste!

prepare-corn-gorditas-stuffed-with-beans.name: Prepare Corn Gorditas Stuffed With Beans
prepare-corn-gorditas-stuffed-with-beans.original_name: Prepara gorditas de maíz rellenas de frijoles
instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta preparando la masa. Para ello, coloca el harina en un bol junto a la sal.
Procede a agregarle el agua poco a poco y ve amasando para darle textura a la masa.
If you notice that mass needs some more water, you add them. Your mass should be soft and very manageable.
Put up a frying pan, iron or comal.
Now, you'll get your dough and make balls the same size and then shape it.
With the help of the tortilla and previously with two plastic protections, put a ball and press the tortilla gently down to form an approximately 10 cm tit, try to avoid leaving very thin.
Also you can do with your balls and you will give them a flat and thin shape, and for them you will smash with both hands gently.
Take your chubby and cook them up at the paddle, iron or frying pan.
Let cook for 2 minutes and turn around and let cook for another 2 minutes. Finally give him two more laps till you see the coffee muffins. The chubby will get a little inflamed.
Once they're a little cold, get a knife and you'll open them up a little while and fill them up.
Now, fill them with frying beans and cheese. You can also fill with beans and any other stew of your choice.
Enjoy them!

prepare-these-delicious-butter-cookies-f.name: Prepare These Delicious Butter Cookies For Easter
prepare-these-delicious-butter-cookies-f.original_name: Prepara estas ricas galletas de mantequilla para pascua

ingredients.item: Glasa para galletas de diferentes colores

instructions: En un bol, incorpora el harina de trigo y el polvo de hornear. Mezcla muy bien hasta que se integren y reserva.
In another bowl, incorporates the butter and with a pallet you are creating. Once soft, add the sugar and mix very well.
When the mixture is creamy, add an egg and a tablespoon of salt. Mix to integrate.
Incorpora la esencia de vainilla e integra hasta tener una textura cremosa.
Fold the wheat flour and mix with your hands and have a mantifiable and homogenous mass.
When the dough's soft, make a ball or an oval.
Divide into two equal parts, cover with film or plastic paper and lead to the refrigerator for seating for 15 minutes.
It purifies the oven at 180 and 3.
After that time, put up your cover and put up the masses. With the help of a roller, it spreads with a thickness of ½ cm.
Una vez extendida, corta con un molde ovalado, tipo huevos de pascua.
Coloca las galletas cortadas en una bandeja con papel encerado y hornea por 12 minutos.
Retract from the oven and let them cool. Once cold you can start to decorate them with the glass.
A tip to decorate them is to add the color to each cookie and bring them to the refrigerator for 10 minutes. Then you add another color. That doesn't get the colors mixed up.
Once ready, enjoy!

prepare-this-traditional-mexican-roast-b.original_name: Prepara esta tradicional carne asada mexicana

½ cda of ground black pepper

instructions: Pela los dientes de ajo y filetea. Trocea el cilantro muy bien.
In a big bowl or bowl put beef into the bowl.
Gather lemon juice, orange juice, soya sauce and olive oil.
It incorporates a touch of sea salt to taste, black pepper, cumin, oregano and chili powder.
Also add garlic and cilantro teeth.
Mezcla muy bien y deja marinar la carne por, al menos, 2 horas.
After that time, get your grill or barbecue ready for coal.
Una vez caliente, coloca los filetes de arrachera a la parrilla y cocina cada pieza por 7 minutos cada lado para que queden cocidos, pero jugosos.
As long as they're on the grill, pour from the marines so that they don't dry and keep their juicy.
Retira los filetes de la parrilla, corta en tiras y disfruta.

pretzels-or-bretzel-the-authentic-german.name: Pretzels Or Bretzel: The Authentic German Recipe
pretzels-or-bretzel-the-authentic-german.original_name: Pretzels o Bretzel caseros: la auténtica receta alemana

ingredients.item: Un poco de sal gruesa para espolvorear

instructions: Fold the leaven into some tibia milk with the sugar and let it rest 10 minutes till it starts to form foam.
In a large bowl we mix 500 g of flour, 1 teaspoon of salt and 1 teaspoon of sugar.
Add milk with yeast, egg and 50 g of soft butter to flour.
We amassed up to get a smooth and elastic mass, about 8-10 minutes by hand or 5 minutes with amiler
Cover the yeast mass and leave it to rest at a warm place for about 1 hour, until about twice its size.
We clear up the dough by amassing again briefly and then divide it into eight portions of 100 g each.
First, form a ball with each portion and then put it up to form a 45 cm long strip. Be sure that the ends of the strip end up at the end, that's to say, they're more thin than the rest of the scroll.
Give them an ironing or "U" shape to each strip, put them together at the centre and wrap them up twice.
Press the ends onto the pretzel and let it stand, covered, for another 15 minutes in a hot place.
Put some water into a big pot. It carefully incorporates sodium bicarbonate (care: it will bubbly a lot!).
Submerge the pretzels, one by one, into the boiling bicarbonate solution for about 30 seconds and then place them on a baking plate with vegetable paper.
Pincela con huevo batido, espolvorea con un poco de sal gruesa.
We bake in an oven with a pre-heated at 200 ″ 3 ″ for 12-15 minutes till they are well golden
We let them tempt slightly onto a grid and we serve still tibious.

puff-pastry-covered-chicken-thigh-lezzet.name: Puff Pastry Covered Chicken Thigh
instructions: 1. Leave the chicken cockroach until the chicken softens.
2. roast the onion to pinkish in small pecan olive oil.
3. Add the cake and roast for 4 minutes.
4. Add salt and spices.
5. Add half a teaspoon chicken water.
6. Go on the sosu chicken buttons.
7. Lightly open the cockroach dough with the roller on the kitchen countertops that you unfold.
8. Place and wrap the buttons on their uniforms.
9. Cut the strips from the remaining dough and glue on it.
10. Remove the egg yolk on it and cook until the oven is fried to 180 degrees.
11. 11. Serve hot.

pumpkin-custard-pie.name: Pumpkin Custard Pie
instructions: Place baked pie shell on a baking sheet. Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs lightly. Add cream, salt, sugar, cinnamon, allspice, and pumpkin. Mix well, then stir in candied ginger and cognac, rum, or bourbon (see Cook's Note). Carefully pour mixture into baked pastry shell.
Bake in preheated oven for 15 minutes.

Reduce oven temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C). Continue to bake until a knife point inserted in the center of the pie comes out clean. Custard will still jiggle. Serve pie warm or at room temperature. Garnish with whipped cream if desired.

pumpkin-roll.name: Pumpkin Roll
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a 10x15-inch jelly roll pan.
To make the cake: Whisk sugar, pumpkin puree, eggs, and cinnamon together in a mixing bowl until smooth and blended.
Mix flour and baking soda together in a separate bowl. Add flour mixture to pumpkin mixture and stir until smooth and no streaks of flour remain. Spread batter evenly in the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until cake springs back when lightly touched, 15 to 20 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool for 5 minutes.

Invert cake onto a smooth cotton (not terry cloth) tea towel. While still warm, roll up cake and towel together, starting from a short edge. Place seam-side down on a wire rack to cool completely, about 15 minutes.
While the cake is cooling, make filling: Beat cream cheese, powdered sugar, butter, and vanilla in a mixing bowl until smooth.

When cake has completely cooled, unroll and remove towel. Spread filling over cake, all the way to the edges. Roll cake up again without the towel. Wrap with plastic wrap and refrigerate until ready to serve.
To serve, sift powdered sugar over the roll and slice into 10 portions.

pumpkin-stuffed-with-rice-argiro.name: Pumpkin Stuffed With Rice
instructions: Wash the pumpkin thoroughly first and remove a slice (cap).
With a spoon or hand, we remove the seeds and fibers.
Add some olive oil and add salt and pepper.
Sprinkle with some fresh thyme.
Put the lid back on and put it on a train or sheet, in a preheated evening at 200°C, in the resistors, on the last grill.
Bake for 1 hour until the pumpkin flesh softens.
Place the brown rice in a small pot and cover with water.
Salt as soon as it boils, lower the heat and simmer for 10 minutes, until it drinks all the water and holds slightly on the tooth (not overheat).
In a pot, heat the olive oil and vegetable butter, add the yolk Kozanis, the macaroni, orange peels, peanuts, walnuts, raisins, apricots, plums, chestnuts and half-boiled rice.
Sprinkle with the chives.
Mix well and control the salt and pepper.
Cover the brown rice with a clean towel and leave for 10 minutes.
Then, remove the pumpkin from the oven and fill it with the aromatic pilafi.
Add the lid and continue baking for 30 minutes.
Either serve the whole (removing the lid) on the buffet or in the center of the table, or cut horizontal slices on each dish and add the filling to the center with a spoon.
Are you getting ready for the holiday table? See here more unique Christmas recipes.

pumpkin-swirl-cheesecake.name: Pumpkin Swirl Cheesecake
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C. Mix ginger snap crumbs, pecans and butter; press firmly onto bottom and 1 inch up side of 9-inch springform pan.

Beat cream cheese, 3/4 cup of the sugar and the vanilla with electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing on low speed after each addition just until blended. Remove 1-1/2 cups of the batter; place in small bowl. Stir remaining 1/4 cup sugar, the pumpkin and spices into remaining batter. Spoon half of the pumpkin batter into crust; top with spoonfuls of half of the reserved plain batter. Repeat layers. Cut through batters with knife several times for marble effect.
Bake 55 min. or until center is almost set. Cool completely. Refrigerate 4 hours or overnight. Cut into 16 slices. Store leftover cheesecake in refrigerator.
